source_jobs.title: DayDream Verification Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT DAYDREAM

DayDream helps dentists serve their patients. We support dental offices behind the scenes — with clarity, consistency, and care — so providers can focus on what matters most. We're a fast-growing, remote-first team that believes in doing good work and being good to each other while we do it.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for an experienced Verification Specialist to join our team. In this role, you’ll complete accurate, detailed insurance verifications each day and help guide the evolution of the verification software we use and build.

This position is perfect for someone with deep in-office experience, strong attention to detail, and a collaborative mindset. You’ll work independently, communicate clearly with teammates, and help improve the tools that support our work.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Complete insurance verifications daily, gathering breakdowns from payer portals and phone calls

 - Input insurance information accurately into Open Dental or similar PMS

 - Use our internal verification software and provide feedback to improve it

 - Collaborate with teammates to support workflow and maintain service quality

 - Prioritize and manage tasks to meet daily deadlines with high accuracy


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 8+ years of dental office experience, specifically in insurance verification

 - Strong proficiency in Open Dental or other dental PMS

 - Experience using Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail, etc.)

 - Clear communication skills and the ability to work independently

 - Meticulous attention to detail and a proactive, solution-oriented mindset

 - A bachelor's degree is a plus, but not required


COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 - Competitive hourly pay

 - Medical, dental, and vision insurance with some plan premiums 100% covered for employees

 - Medical and dependent care FSA options

 - PTO and sick time accrue from day one

 - 9 paid holidays annually

 - Company-provided laptop

We’re here to build better systems, stronger teams, and a more thoughtful approach to dental billing. If that sounds like your kind of work, we’d love to hear from you.


DayDream is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status.

source_jobs.title: DayDream Claim Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT DAYDREAM

DayDream helps dentists serve their patients. We support dental offices behind the scenes with clarity, consistency, and care so that providers can focus on what matters most. We're a fast-growing, remote-first team that believes in doing good work and being good to each other while we do it.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for an experienced, detail-oriented Claim Specialist to help our clients navigate insurance with confidence. This role is critical to the claim lifecycle from submission to resolution and plays a key part in shaping the tools we use every day.

As a Claim Specialist at DayDream, you won’t just process claims. You’ll help design the future of how we do it by working closely with our software engineering team to fine-tune internal tools and make our platform even better.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Submit claims accurately and completely with all required attachments and documentation

 - Post insurance payments with speed and accuracy in accordance with the received EOB

 - Follow up on outstanding claims to reduce claim aging

 - Handle denials and appeals professionally and efficiently, interpreting EOBs and rejection codes

 - Collaborate with our software engineering team to provide feedback and ideas that improve our internal tools

 - Work cross-functionally with teammates in billing, operations, and client success to deliver excellent service


WHAT YOU'LL BRING

 - 8+ years of experience in dental revenue cycle management (RCM), especially claims processing

 - Deep familiarity with dental billing software and comfort with tools like Google Workspace, Slack and remote connection softwares

 - Clear, professional communication skills, both written and verbal

 - Strong organization and problem-solving skills, with high attention to detail

 - A collaborative mindset and an interest in improving internal systems and workflows

 - A bachelor's degree is nice to have, but not required


COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 - Competitive hourly pay

 - Medical, dental, and vision insurance some with plan option premiums 100% covered for employees

 - Medical and dependent care FSA options

 - PTO and sick time accrue from day one

 - 9 paid holidays annually

 - Company-provided laptop



We believe great work happens when people feel supported and heard. If you care about doing things well, want to help build something meaningful, and thrive in a remote environment, we’d love to meet you.

DayDream is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of protected veteran status, disability, or other legally protected status.

source_jobs.title: Founding Full Cycle AE
source_jobs.description:
About DayDream



Watch the DayDream Story in 7-Minutes

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0771zn2hVZYDayDream https://www.daydream.dental/ helps dentists get paid for the work they do. In this $165B market, our product simplifies the complex process of verifying insurance coverage, submitting claims, appealing denials, billing patients, and maintaining clean books. As a result of how complex this process is and how many things get lost in the process, dentists can lose 10-20% of their revenue!



What this leads to is the things patients hate about the American healthcare system: it’s inefficient, unaffordable, and just too d*mn confusing. We work with a lot of dentists and they don’t love it either. Dentists want to treat you, help you, and see you smile.



We believe that by automating parts of revenue cycle management, we increase financial transparency for everyone involved - patients, providers, and help support small business owner dentists across America. Practices that work with DayDream can recover



We've raised $6.5M from 8VC https://www.8vc.com/ and Nat Friedman and Daniel Gross through AI Grant https://aigrant.com/

 - Nat Friedman https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nat_Friedman: former CEO of GitHub, helped launch GitHub CoPilot. Investor in companies like: Figma, Stripe, Retool, Scale AI, Vercel, Perplexity, Streamlit, and more

 - Daniel Gross https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Daniel_Gross_(entrepreneur): youngest partner at YCombinator, Times 100 Most Influential People in AI. Investor in companies like: Instacart, Coinbase, Airtable, Rippling, Notion, Character.ai http://Character.ai
   http://character.ai/

The Role

As the Founding AE at DayDream, you’ll play a critical role in building the sales organization. We’ve nailed product-market fit — our customers love us, our retention is exceptional, and demand is growing fast. We’re now looking for our first Founding AE to ride that wave, close high-quality deals, and help shape the future of our go-to-market motion.



What You’ll Do



 - Own the Full Sales Cycle: Lead discovery, tailor demos, handle objections, negotiate pricing, and close deals with speed and precision.

 - Drive Pipeline Growth: Work inbound leads and get scrappy with outbound — email, LinkedIn, creative campaigns, referrals, and whatever else works.

 - Navigate Complex Deals: Partner with owners to guide deals across the finish line.

 - Build with the Team: Relay insights to product and engineering to influence roadmap, and help improve onboarding and handoff processes.

 - Define the Sales Motion: Develop repeatable playbooks, optimize CRM hygiene, forecast revenue, and refine messaging — we’re building this from the ground up.

 - Champion the Customer: Cultivate long-term relationships that drive retention, upsells, and referrals.




YOU’LL BE A GREAT FIT IF YOU…





 - Have 1-2 years of startup experience, preferably in a fast-growing startup environment.

 - Are motivated by serving customers and helping American businesses and entrepreneurs.

 - Operate like an owner — proactive, accountable, and allergic to mediocrity.

 - Thrive in ambiguity and love building from 0→1.

 - Are analytical, coachable, and growth-obsessed.

 - Have a chip on your shoulder and something to prove.




WHY JOIN US





 - Real PMF: We’re not guessing. We have a deep backlog of demand, sticky retention, and strong customer ROI.

 - Founding Role: Influence pricing, positioning, sales ops, and team building from the ground floor.

 - Massive Upside: You’ll earn equity in a high-growth company with a clear path to Series A and beyond.

 - Tight-Knit Team: You’ll work directly with the founders, product, and engineering to make things happen — fast.



🚀 Ready to help us build a category-defining company? Apply now and let’s talk

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (Product)
source_jobs.description:
DayDream helps dentists get paid for the work they do. In this $165B market, our product simplifies the complex process of verifying insurance coverage, submitting claims, appealing denials, billing patients, and maintaining clean books. As a result of how complex this process is and how many things get lost in the process, dentists can lose 10-20% of their revenue!

What this leads to is the things patients hate about the American healthcare system: it’s inefficient, unaffordable, and just too d*mn confusing. We work with a lot of dentists and they don’t love it either. Dentists want to treat you, help you, and see you smile.

We believe that by automating parts of revenue cycle management, we increase financial transparency for everyone involved - patients, providers, and help support small business owner dentists across America.




THE ROLE

We are looking for a full-stack product engineer.



Role Responsibilities:

 - Design, build, and maintain user facing applications for our customers and internal billing team

 - Model complex and data-intensive domains well both from a backend and UI perspective.

 - Own and iterate on product strategy alongside domain experts and customers who are using your tool everyday and rely on it to keep their business running

 - Help shape engineering culture from the ground up.




SIGNS YOU ARE A GOOD FIT

 - You have shipped full end-to-end products on your own that generated revenue

 - You have been part of an early engineering team at a startup

 - Have worked cross-functionally with multiple different departments and shipped substantial features end-to-end

 - Ran a startup as the core technical contributor previously or considering starting your own




TEAM

 - Anton Lin, Co-Founder, CTO:
   
   - Formerly co-founded Scout, scaled to $1M ARR before an exit to StockX
   
   - Built and grew several SaaS businesses to 7 figures in revenue
   
   - UC Berkeley dropout (3 weeks!)

 - Shreyas Parab, Co-Founder, CEO:
   
   - Formerly first employee at YC W23 startup, Special projects for billionaire Dan Gilbert
   
   - Started and grew D2C brand to $75k in annual sales, started/sold ed-tech company, Senior Class President at Stanford, student representative on the Board of Trustees
   
   - Stanford Biomedical Computation

 - Our (currently) <5 people engineering team includes former founders, early engineers from Ramp, NSA recruits, Michelin star chefs.



We've raised $6.5M from 8VC https://www.8vc.com/ and Nat Friedman and Daniel Gross through AI Grant https://aigrant.com

 - Nat Friedman https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nat_Friedman: former CEO of GitHub, helped launch GitHub CoPilot. Investor in companies like: Figma, Stripe, Retool, Scale AI, Vercel, Perplexity, Streamlit, and more

 - Daniel Gross https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Daniel_Gross_(entrepreneur): youngest partner at YCombinator, Times 100 Most Influential People in AI. Investor in companies like: Instacart, Coinbase, Airtable, Rippling, Notion, Character.ai http://Character.ai

source_jobs.title: Founding BizOps
source_jobs.description:
About DayDream



Watch the DayDream Story in 7-Minutes

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0771zn2hVZYDayDream https://www.daydream.dental/ helps dentists get paid for the work they do. In this $165B market, our product simplifies the complex process of verifying insurance coverage, submitting claims, appealing denials, billing patients, and maintaining clean books. As a result of how complex this process is and how many things get lost in the process, dentists can lose 10-20% of their revenue!



What this leads to is the things patients hate about the American healthcare system: it’s inefficient, unaffordable, and just too d*mn confusing. We work with a lot of dentists and they don’t love it either. Dentists want to treat you, help you, and see you smile.



We believe that by automating parts of revenue cycle management, we increase financial transparency for everyone involved - patients, providers, and help support small business owner dentists across America. Practices that work with DayDream can recover



We've raised $6.5M from 8VC https://www.8vc.com/ and Nat Friedman and Daniel Gross through AI Grant https://aigrant.com/

 - Nat Friedman https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nat_Friedman: former CEO of GitHub, helped launch GitHub CoPilot. Investor in companies like: Figma, Stripe, Retool, Scale AI, Vercel, Perplexity, Streamlit, and more

 - Daniel Gross https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Daniel_Gross_(entrepreneur): youngest partner at YCombinator, Times 100 Most Influential People in AI. Investor in companies like: Instacart, Coinbase, Airtable, Rippling, Notion, Character.ai http://Character.ai
   http://character.ai/

The Role

As the Founding Business Operations hire at DayDream, you’ll play a critical role in building the internal systems, strategic foundation, and go-to-market motion that power our next stage of growth through the Series A and beyond. You’ll operate as a cross-functional generalist with a focus on solving high-priority business problems—ranging from customer acquisition and enterprise expansion to operational efficiency and customer experience. If you are looking to start your own company or operate a 7-figure business, this is the perfect place to be the right hand to the founders.



This will be an ever-evolving role, but some immediate responsibilities include:



Strategy & Internal Operations (70-80%)

 - Solve operational bottlenecks: Identify and fix pain points in how customers experience DayDream - from sales to onboarding to customer success. We went from 0 to 1 quickly, many of these critical functions are emerging, you can help build and structure them

 - Lead cross-functional initiatives: Own high-priority projects across the company: from fundraising to large 7-figure enterprise deployments to hiring the next

 - Define and track key business KPIs: Build dashboards, reporting, and analytics frameworks that help the team make faster, more informed decisions.

 - Build foundational systems: Help design and implement scalable internal processes and tools that support DayDream’s delivery model

 - Be a strategic partner to the founders: Take on ambiguous or urgent priorities and help drive clarity and execution when it matters most



Growth, GTM, and External Engagement (20–30%)

 - Support go-to-market strategy: Help define customer segments, pricing models, and GTM motions for both consumer and enterprise growth

 - Manage key enterprise relationships: Support pricing, onboarding, and success for DayDream’s customers, along with DayDream’s founder

 - Bring customer insights into the business: Work closely with product and ops teams to translate partner and patient feedback into product roadmap decisions

 - Build external-facing collateral: Create case studies, sales materials, and pitch decks that tell DayDream’s story and drive adoption


What we’re looking for

 - 2-3 total years of experience, ideally in a combination of top tier management consulting or investment banking plus experienc

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (Frontend)
source_jobs.description:
DayDream helps dentists get paid for the work they do. In this $165B market, our product simplifies the complex process of verifying insurance coverage, submitting claims, appealing denials, billing patients, and maintaining clean books. As a result of how complex this process is and how many things get lost in the process, dentists can lose 10-20% of their revenue!

What this leads to is the things patients hate about the American healthcare system: it’s inefficient, unaffordable, and just too d*mn confusing. We work with a lot of dentists and they don’t love it either. Dentists want to treat you, help you, and see you smile.

We believe that by automating parts of revenue cycle management, we increase financial transparency for everyone involved - patients, providers, and help support small business owner dentists across America.




THE ROLE

We are looking for a frontend focused engineer.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Create and maintain a reusable component library in React/Next.js from the ground-up.

 - Build interactive workflows that visualize complex insurance and financial data.

 - Set and continually increase the bar for UI/UX polish.

 - Bring structure and craft to our frontend codebase, focusing on accessibility, performance, and responsiveness.

 - Help establish frontend patterns, design systems, and interface conventions.


SIGNS YOU'RE A GOOD FIT

 - You have experience building “power tools,” meaning complex, multi-step interfaces with high functionality.

 - You have deep experience with React and Next.js.

 - You have deep experience optimizing React performance.

 - You have built and maintained a scalable component system or design system.

 - You have strong design sensibility and a high bar for UI polish and interaction.


CURRENT PROBLEMS TO BE SOLVED

 - How do we build a maintainable component library?

 - How do we virtualize our large tables?

 - How do we build reusable page layouts to ensure consistency across the app?

 - How do we build UIs that allow users to configure complex data pipeline schemas in a no-code way?

 - How do we make our UI as dense as possible to increase productivity while maintaining usability for non technology-native users?




TEAM

 - Anton Lin, Co-Founder, CTO:
   
   - Formerly co-founded Scout, scaled to $1M ARR before an exit to StockX
   
   - Built and grew several SaaS businesses to 7 figures in revenue
   
   - UC Berkeley dropout (3 weeks!)

 - Shreyas Parab, Co-Founder, CEO:
   
   - Formerly first employee at YC W23 startup, Special projects for billionaire Dan Gilbert
   
   - Started and grew D2C brand to $75k in annual sales, started/sold ed-tech company, Senior Class President at Stanford, student representative on the Board of Trustees
   
   - Stanford Biomedical Computation

 - Our (currently) <5 people engineering team includes former founders, early engineers from Ramp, NSA recruits, Michelin star chefs.

source_jobs.title: Founding Designer
source_jobs.description:
DayDream is building Stripe for dentists. In this $165B market, our product automates the complex (and expensive) administrative process of interfacing with insurance companies to get paid. Today, dentists lose 10-20% of their revenue due to not doing this process correctly.

 

What this leads to are the things patients hate about the American healthcare system: it’s inefficient, unaffordable, and just too d*mn confusing.

We believe that by automating the administrative work of billing, we increase financial transparency for everyone involved - patients, providers, and help support small business owner dentists across America. And this is just the first step in our vision: helping dentists across America focus on what matters to them, caring for patients.

 

Responsibilities include:

 - Designing DayDream internal - 100x an experienced domain expert using agents while being beautiful and intuitive.

 - Designing DayDream external - a beautiful and intuitive portal to manage your practice’s income.

 - Brand Design - This includes team merch, conference swag, marketing material

 - Set the bar for design craft and UX in all parts of the company

 
 

Team:

Anton Lin - CTO & Co-Founder, Previously sold his company to StockX

Shreyas Parab - Stanford Biomedical systems, prev. Special projects for Billionaire Dan Gilbert



Founding Story (7min): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0771zn2hVZY
Podcast w/ Joe Lonsdale: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ot0ofWCEuy4

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (Platform)
source_jobs.description:
DayDream helps dentists get paid for the work they do. In this $165B market, our product simplifies the complex process of verifying insurance coverage, submitting claims, appealing denials, billing patients, and maintaining clean books. As a result of how complex this process is and how many things get lost in the process, dentists can lose 10-20% of their revenue!

What this leads to is the things patients hate about the American healthcare system: it’s inefficient, unaffordable, and just too d*mn confusing. We work with a lot of dentists and they don’t love it either. Dentists want to treat you, help you, and see you smile.

We believe that by automating parts of revenue cycle management, we increase financial transparency for everyone involved - patients, providers, and help support small business owner dentists across America.




THE ROLE

We are looking for a frontend focused engineer.







THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Platform Engineer who’s obsessed with building fast, reliable, and secure systems—and giving product engineers the tools they need to ship with confidence. You’ll be the backbone of our infra, observability, and deployment pipeline, owning everything from monitoring and alerting to networking, security, and CI/CD.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own observability (Datadog) and ensure our systems are monitored, alerting, and self-healing

 - Build and maintain secure, scalable cloud infrastructure (AWS + Terraform)

 - Help achieve HIPAA and SOC 2 compliance

 - Own CI/CD pipelines to help us ship safely and frequently

 - Create complex dev/staging environments

 - Set up and manage data infra to support product and analytics use cases





SIGNS YOU’RE A GOOD FIT

 - You've been the first infra hire or platform lead at a startup

 - You’ve built tools that made other engineers 10x more productive

 - You’ve got strong opinions on infrastructure, but you’re pragmatic about tradeoffs




TEAM

 - Anton Lin, Co-Founder, CTO:
   
   - Formerly co-founded Scout, scaled to $1M ARR before an exit to StockX
   
   - Built and grew several SaaS businesses to 7 figures in revenue
   
   - UC Berkeley dropout (3 weeks!)

 - Shreyas Parab, Co-Founder, CEO:
   
   - Formerly first employee at YC W23 startup, Special projects for billionaire Dan Gilbert
   
   - Started and grew D2C brand to $75k in annual sales, started/sold ed-tech company, Senior Class President at Stanford, student representative on the Board of Trustees
   
   - Stanford Biomedical Computation

 - Our (currently) <5 people engineering team includes former founders, early engineers from Ramp, NSA recruits, Michelin star chefs.

notes: DayDream is a fast-growing, remote-first team that supports dental offices with clarity, consistency, and care.
